title: Generate substrate-wide v1.0.0 binding-state audit doc
description: After the 2026-05-12 commissioning, the substrate has 7 organisms bound to core-entity-set-v1.0.0 (wrkstrm-components + wrkstrm + 5 operators) and most other agents still on core-triad-set-v0.6.0 or somewhere in the core-entity v0.7-v0.9 corridor. The cadence bead 'identity-schema-set-refs-sweep' is BLOCKED on operator authorization to migrate agents from v0.7/v0.8 to v0.9 — that needs to happen before v1.0.0 binding can sweep across the substrate. A short audit doc would help: who's bound where, what's the cadence-bead status, what's the recommended sequencing for closing the gap. Suggested home: schema-universal/universal-schema.incident.docc/ alongside the existing core-entity-v1-0-0-spec-investigation.md. Operator-readable snapshot, not new doctrine.
